query: SELECT pg_get_indexdef(indexes.indexrelid) AS "indexdef!", pg_get_expr(indexes.indpred, indexes.indrelid) AS "predicate!" FROM pg_index indexes JOIN pg_class index_class ON index_class.oid = indexes.indexrelid JOIN pg_class table_class ON table_class.oid = indexes.indrelid JOIN pg_namespace namespace ON namespace.oid = table_class.relnamespace WHERE namespace.nspname = 'pgqueue' AND index_class.relname = 'jobs_running_group_unique_idx'
